  1. 您的足迹
  2. nrf52840

侧边栏
  • developmentboard
  • nrf52840
  • esp32-c3mini
  • ESP32-S3-Leaf

  • Permalink

Special note:

The default factory built-in program is Blink-All-IO (all IO ports automatically flip over in 1S). If you need to enter Nice! Nano V2 Bootloader Please short-circuit RST to GND twice within 0.5S. Just press the RST button twice on the keyboard board within 0.5 seconds.

Introduction

SuperMini NRF52840 is a Pro Micro alternative development board that is compatible with Nice! Nano. Its pins are the same as ProMicro, which means it can be used with almost any ProMicro keyboard. The NRF5280 development board has a 3.7V lithium battery interface and a software switch that can cut off the power of the LED. When turned off, the standby power consumption can reach 1mA.

nRF52840 is a high-performance, low-power wireless SoC chip launched by Norwegian Nordic Semiconductor. It supports multiple wireless protocols, including Bluetooth 5, Thread, Zigbee, ANT, and 2.4GHz. The nRF52840 chip uses an ARM Cortex-M4F processor, clocked at 64MHz, with built-in 1MB of flash memory and 256KB of RAM. It also has a variety of peripherals, including ADC, PWM, SPI, I2C, UART, USB and GPIO, etc. In addition, nRF52840 also supports a variety of security functions, such as AES encryption, SHA-256 hashing and True Random Number Generator (TRNG).

Hardware description

Product Parameters Powerful wireless capabilities: Bluetooth 5.0, onboard antennaPowerful CPU: nRF52840 chip uses ARM Cortex-M4F processor, clocked at 64MHz, built-in 1MB flash memory and 256KB RAMBattery charging chip: supports lithium battery charging and dischargingPower consumption: standby power consumption can reach 1mA

Pin Diagram

Dimensions

Power Supply

SuperMini NRF52840 supports charging and discharging of 3.7V lithium battery. The charging rate is 100mA during charging, so a 2000mAh battery takes 20 hours to be fully charged.

Recharging Current warnWhen BOOST is connected, the charging current increases from 100ma to 300ma, and it can only be connected when the capacitor capacity is greater than 500mAh (to avoid explosion💥).

External Battery

If you need an external battery, you only need to connect the + stage of the battery to B+ and the negative stage to B-. The external lithium battery only supports 3.7V and the charging rate is 100mA (a 2000mAh battery takes 20 hours to be fully charged).NoticeWhen welding, please be careful not to short-circuit the positive and negative poles, which may burn the battery and equipment.

External VCC control

hintWhen P0.13 is set to low, the power supply to the 3.3V, VCC pin will be turned off. This is useful for reducing components that use power when idle (e.g. RGB, LEDs).

Bootloader

If you want to enter Bootloder, please short RST to GND twice within 0.5S. Enter Bootloder, connect to the computer via USB, and a storage device called Nice! Nano will be displayed. At this point you can drag in the .uf2 file to burn the program.

QS-NRF52840 V1.2-PCB FootPrint

qs-nrf52840_v1.2-pcb_footprint.zip

BUY

Aliexpress： https://www.aliexpress.us/item/1005006035267231.html?gatewayAdapt=glo2usa

TINDIE：

评论

W, 2024/03/19 00:57

能否在你们的 wiki 上提供 PCB 基底面？

我知道大部分基底面都与 nice!nano 或 ProMicro 相同，但不包括 3 个额外的引脚 p1.01、p1.02、p1.02。我需要尺寸和距离，以便在 PCB 上为这些 GPIO 引脚开孔。

用 Deepl 翻译

admin, 2024/03/19 14:41

W, 2024/03/19 00:58

PCB 印迹“

bluedrink9, 2024/04/07 07:41

I have converted the PCB files to a KiCAD footprint here: https://github.com/BlueDrink9/supermini-nrf52840-kicad

JB, 2024/04/09 16:55

Would it be possible to provide a 3D model of this PCB? I believe it would greatly benefit the product development process, particularly in designing the product's case, or designing a keyboard based on this board, and conducting integration testing. Additionally, exporting a 3D model from Altium is a straightforward process.

HANSOO KIM, 2024/06/26 07:56

Anyone tried with arduino sketch ? I failed couple of NREF52840 board, it won't boot again anymore.

once i connected USB-C, it appears COM port correctly and burn to programs. it is look death. just blink blue led only.

BOARD : Adafruit feather nRF52840 Express SoftDevice : S140.6.1.1 Port : “COM7” Programmer : “Bootloader DFU for bluefruit nRF52” Code : Default empty code

majso, 2025/03/08 08:20

You have to short RST pint to GND twice and it should switch to programming mode

abde, 2024/08/10 12:35

hello, i would like ask you aboutr the I2C pins for this board, i culdnt identify them thank you so much

Bigfang, 2024/08/17 04:34

Where is the board opensourced at?

Bryce, 2024/08/30 18:20

Hello, I have created a reference model for this development board. It can be found here: https://www.printables.com/model/990134-supermini-pro-micro-nrf52840-reference-model

I hope it helps you in your development endeavors.

Caio, 2024/09/24 21:43

I will need to use the NFC feature of NRF52840. So, how will I plug the NFC antenna on this board? Please confirm to me that I will need to solder an NFC antenna to pins P0.09 and P0.10

Basel Saleh, 2024/09/25 05:00

Is there any way to disable leds or lower current consumption on startup? Right now when I wake from deep sleep it pulls 7mA for half a second

Eric Miner, 2025/01/01 06:50

Did you solve this? I have the same question?

Sašo Domadenik, 2025/01/13 21:02

The schematic is published at https://chat.nologo.tech/d/80 I reuploaded it to https://imgur.com/gallery/nrf52840-supermini-promicro-schematic-q1T3BJY

Dominik Dufner, 2025/01/16 20:17

Has anyone been able to read the battery voltage? It looks like it should be possible on P0.04 based on the schematics. Using Zephyr I was able to read a voltage from a different source on a different AIN pin. Appreciate help.

Sašo Domadenik, 2025/01/22 17:49

According to the schematic, the voltage divider for the battery voltage is NC so the resistors are not installed. I'm not 100% but I think these are the two empty 0201 footprints between the two SOT23 ICs

Sašo Domadenik, 2025/06/26 18:41

Ok so after doing some measaurements it seems that the schematic is wrong. Even after installing the two 0201 resistors, you can't measure voltage on P0.04 because the divider is actually connected to P0.24

Bettygom, 2025/01/28 18:05

How might individuals with Asperger Syndrome or autism contribute unique insights to the design, development, and application of ESP32-S3-Leaf and NRF52840 development boards? Considering their attention to detail, logical thinking, and unique problem-solving abilities, what possible innovations could stem from their perspectives in the context of these development boards?

Tamika, 2025/11/07 10:52

About best time to hike

Hi Guys, Only if you really think about Leura?! We have more detailed information about Katoomba

tours of the Blue Mountains are far from an ordinary day out — they’re a full-on adventure.

When I first started leading groups up the route west from Sydney, I realised we were in for something special: misty valleys, towering rock formations, and those iconic eucalyptus trees that give the mountains their blue haze. Every adventure through the Blue Mountains still feels like a new discovery, and if you’re ready to experience it, here’s how to get the most out of it.

Just a short drive from the city, the UNESCO-listed Blue Mountains region covers over one million hectares of wild landscapes, gorges and mountain plateaus. This World Heritage-listed wonderland is recognised for its unique environment and Indigenous roots.

The towns of Katoomba, Leura, Wentworth Falls and Blackheath anchor most Blue Mountains tours. Whether you book a guided trip from Sydney, every route offers a different perspective: from Echo Point’s panoramic view of the Three Sisters to lush trails deep in Jamison Valley.

Please visit our site about attractions please click https://chachamortors.com/bbs/board.php?bo_table=free&wr_id=6463975 for Sign up for a free consultation now!

Tags: Katoomba, accommodations, Katoomba Falls, Hunter Valley wine tours,

About best time to hike

Hi Guys, Only if you really think about Leura?! We have more detailed information about Katoomba

tours of the Blue Mountains are far from an ordinary day out — they’re a full-on adventure. When I first started leading groups up the route west from Sydney, I realised we were in for something special: misty valleys, towering rock formations, and those iconic eucalyptus trees that give the mountains their blue haze. Every adventure through the Blue Mountains still feels like a new discovery, and if you’re ready to experience it, here’s how to get the most out of it.

Just a short drive from the city, the UNESCO-listed Blue Mountains region covers over one million hectares of wild landscapes, gorges and mountain plateaus. This World Heritage-listed wonderland is recognised for its unique environment and Indigenous roots.

The towns of Katoomba, Leura, Wentworth Falls and Blackheath anchor most Blue Mountains tours. Whether you book a guided trip from Sydney, every route offers a different perspective: from Echo Point’s panoramic view of the Three Sisters to lush trails deep in Jamison Valley.

Emerson, 2026/01/11 14:52

About Professional eyebrow tattoo Melbourne

Good Day Girls, Only if you really think about Ombre and powder brow tattoo at Face Figurati?! We have detailed information about Signature brow tattoo by Olha Po Melburnians ask me to perform brow microblading more than anything else — and I guess there’s a good reason for that.

A lot of locals are just fed up with filling in their brows every morning — only to see them disappear as soon as they head out or exercise.

And honestly, who can blame them? It’s a frustrating hassle.

I’m Olha Po, and after nearly a decade of tattooing brows on all sorts of different people, I’ve understood just why people are wanting something that appears natural, offers longevity, and reduces hassle.

But serving clients here is unique — they’re energetic, confident, and focused on precision. So designing eyebrows that not only endure the city’s climate but still look soft and natural is both an art and a science.

This article is going to show you how eyebrow microblading actually functions, who it’s best for, what happens during the healing process, what you can expect from the results, and a bit about what happens behind the scenes at Cosmetic Tattoo Studio Melbourne.

Think of it as a friendly chat — minus the latte and the small talk you’d typically get if you just walked through the door.

Please visit our website about Ombre and powder brow tattoo at Face Figurati please click http://ytks.net/ for Sign up for a free consultation now!

Our's Tags: Cosmetic brow tattoo at Face Figurati Studio, Ombre and powder brow tattoo at Face Figurati, Eyebrow tattoo Melbourne at Face Figurati, Sculpted brows with eyebrow tattooing, Eyebrow tattooing services in Melbourne, Cosmetic brow tattoo at Face Figurati Studio

Signature brow tattoo by Olha Po, 2026/01/11 14:52

About Professional eyebrow tattoo Melbourne

Good Day Girls, Only if you really think about Ombre and powder brow tattoo at Face Figurati?! We have detailed information about Signature brow tattoo by Olha Po Melburnians ask me to perform brow microblading more than anything else — and I guess there’s a good reason for that.

A lot of locals are just fed up with filling in their brows every morning — only to see them disappear as soon as they head out or exercise. And honestly, who can blame them? It’s a frustrating hassle.

I’m Olha Po, and after nearly a decade of tattooing brows on all sorts of different people, I’ve understood just why people are wanting something that appears natural, offers longevity, and reduces hassle.

But serving clients here is unique — they’re energetic, confident, and focused on precision. So designing eyebrows that not only endure the city’s climate but still look soft and natural is both an art and a science.

This article is going to show you how eyebrow microblading actually functions, who it’s best for, what happens during the healing process, what you can expect from the results, and a bit about what happens behind the scenes at Cosmetic Tattoo Studio Melbourne.

Think of it as a friendly chat — minus the latte and the small talk you’d typically get if you just walked through the door.

Please visit our website about Ombre and powder brow tattoo at Face Figurati please click http://ytks.net/ for Sign up for a free consultation now!

Our's Tags: Cosmetic brow tattoo at Face Figurati Studio, Ombre and powder brow tattoo at Face Figurati, Eyebrow tattoo Melbourne at Face Figurati, Sculpted brows with eyebrow tattooing, Eyebrow tattooing services in Melbourne, Cosmetic brow tattoo at Face Figurati Studio

«Авиатор» — это увлекательная краш-игра, где игроки ставят на увеличение коэффициента, связанного с полетом самолета авиатор казино регистрация. Ваша задача — вовремя вывести деньги, прежде чем самолет «разобьется».

Lavada, 2026/03/22 09:06

About Katherine tours from Darwin

Hi Guys, Only if you really think about melbourne snow tour?! We have detailed information about exmouth tour

Your no-nonsense guide to Great Ocean Road tours starts in a place most Aussies think they already know — and trust me, after guiding here for years, it’s rougher and more dramatic than the tourist snaps show.

One trip I did years back with Wildlife Tours still sticks with me, leaving Melbourne with a busload of excited travellers, even though the weather report promised a shocker. It’s blue skies in Torquay, chaos by Apollo Bay, which is exactly why people love it — it’s the real deal.

You’ll soon see that no two Great Ocean Road tours ever look alike. I’ve had days where the Twelve Apostles looked as flat as a pancake under grey skies, and others where the cliffs looked like they were carved yesterday. If you want a trip that’s got wild edges, tight corners and real coastal drama, then come along — I’ve driven this road enough to know every hidden gem.

Please visit our site about crocodile tours please click https://albanyautochicago.com/a-culinary-journey-through-the-grampians/ for Sign up for a free consultation now!

Our's Tags: Phillip Island, Great Ocean Road tour from Melbourne, Katherine Gorge tour, melbourne snow tour, Great Ocean Road trips, 2 day Uluru tour

exmouth tour, 2026/03/22 09:06

About Katherine tours from Darwin

Hi Guys, Only if you really think about melbourne snow tour?! We have detailed information about exmouth tour

Your no-nonsense guide to Great Ocean Road tours starts in a place most Aussies think they already know — and trust me, after guiding here for years, it’s rougher and more dramatic than the tourist snaps show. It’s blue skies in Torquay, chaos by Apollo Bay, which is exactly why people love it — it’s the real deal.

Alycia, 2026/03/22 21:17

About Signature brow tattoo by Olha Po

Good Day Guys, Only if you really think about Brow tattoo artist Olha Po?! We have detailed information about Brow tattoo artist Olha Po When you enter the world of eyebrow tattooing Brisbane, you should know you’re in the right place — and that’s exactly how we approach things at Cosmetic Tattoo Studio Brisbane.

It’s as though we’re hosting friends rather than a busy tattoo studio.

As professionals with extensive experience under our belts, between us we’ve worked in Europe & Australia and experienced all the fads. We can safely say the best brows are never the ones that look forced — they just fit.

Hi there, I’m the co-founder, and my team mate and I collaborate to design arches that appear effortless if you were starting your day as they would if we’d spent an hour perfecting them.

They look soft, believable — the kind of eyebrows that make you go, “That’s my look — but better!”

If you’re wondering about how our cosmetic brow tattooing process works, how the recovery happens, who we think will suit cosmetic tattooing, and what takes place during your session at our place in Brisbane, well, you’ve landed in the right place.

So let’s go through all the details you need to know before you call us.

our website about Professional eyebrow tattoo Melbourne please click http://macocoi.com for Sign up for a free consultation now!

Katja, 2026/03/23 16:31

About lip line tattoo

Hello Guys, Only if you really think about semi permanent lip liner?!

We have more detailed information about semi permanent lip liner

Lip liner tattoo is one of those treatments that instantly gets people curious.

At Cosmetic Tattoo Studio Brisbane Face Figurati, clients often ask: “Is it the same as lip blush?” The answer is simple — when it’s done right, a lip liner tattoo enhances your natural lip contour without that old-school lip pencil vibe.

Our certified cosmetic tattoo artist Uliana Kasperska has mastered the technique from Europe to Brisbane’s humid climate, understanding exactly which pigments last.

Why People Choose a Defined Lip Border Every face tells its own story — and lips age in ways we don’t always expect. The vermillion border, that fine outline around the lips, naturally fades with time, making lips look less defined. Instead of overlining daily, a tattoo lip liner restores a crisp, balanced edge so lipstick applies neatly and bare lips still look refined.

Many of our Brisbane clients book after noticing their Cupid’s bow softening. With the right pigment choice and skilled hand, lip line tattooing offers natural definition that lasts. Please visit our website about lip liner cosmetic tattoo please click https://n4vn33t.com/what-are-the-pros-and-cons-of-lip-tattoos/ for a free consultation now

Tags: Lip lining tattoo, semi permanent lip liner, lip liner tattooing, semi permanent lip liner, lip liner tattooing, lip liner cosmetic tattoo,

semi permanent lip liner, 2026/03/23 16:31

About lip line tattoo

Hello Guys, Only if you really think about semi permanent lip liner?!

We have more detailed information about semi permanent lip liner

Lip liner tattoo is one of those treatments that instantly gets people curious. At Cosmetic Tattoo Studio Brisbane Face Figurati, clients often ask: “Is it the same as lip blush?” The answer is simple — when it’s done right, a lip liner tattoo enhances your natural lip contour without that old-school lip pencil vibe.

Our certified cosmetic tattoo artist Uliana Kasperska has mastered the technique from Europe to Brisbane’s humid climate, understanding exactly which pigments last.

Why People Choose a Defined Lip Border Every face tells its own story — and lips age in ways we don’t always expect. The vermillion border, that fine outline around the lips, naturally fades with time, making lips look less defined. Instead of overlining daily, a tattoo lip liner restores a crisp, balanced edge so lipstick applies neatly and bare lips still look refined.

Many of our Brisbane clients book after noticing their Cupid’s bow softening. With the right pigment choice and skilled hand, lip line tattooing offers natural definition that lasts.

Galen, 2026/03/31 05:47

Good Day Guys, Only if you really think about Melbourne?!

We have more detailed information about wedding

Planning a wedding in Melbourne pulls you right in, & I find myself remembering all the wedding ceremonies I've wandered through — beachside vows on the sand to stylish city receptions. When you're actually standing there on the cusp of that truly unforgettable moment, suddenly all these tiny details ( the venue, your accommodation, even that all-important cup of coffee before the ceremony ) start to feel surprisingly heavy. And if you're thinking of having a bayside bash, the name Brighton Savoy is bound to come up pretty quickly — it's a classic go-to among couples wanting that Port Phillip Bay magic without all the hassle.

Melbourne brings a certain edge to weddings that you just don't find everywhere — a crazy mix of urban charm, coastline & culinary magic that's just as suited to a laid-back coastal ceremony as it is to some stylish inner-city reception. You're spoiled for choice, which is both the best & worst part of it all.

The thing about a Melbourne wedding is that it doesn't need to be some elaborate event with bells & whistles — at the end of the day, you're tying your life to another person — everything else is just icing on the cake. Focus on the heart of it — good people, beautiful places & the freedom to celebrate your relationship however you choose.

Every single option shapes the entire day — the logistics, your accommodation, even the photos — each one layers in to create the sort of day you'll remember for the rest of your life.

Please visit our internet portal about accommodation please click https://godstudio.co.in/?g=437420215 for Sign up for a free consultation now!

Tags: Melbourne accommodation, accommodation, Melbourne wedding, Melbourne accommodation,

wedding, 2026/03/31 05:47

Planning a wedding in Melbourne pulls you right in, & I find myself remembering all the wedding ceremonies I've wandered through — beachside vows on the sand to stylish city receptions. When you're actually standing there on the cusp of that truly unforgettable moment, suddenly all these tiny details ( the venue, your accommodation, even that all-important cup of coffee before the ceremony ) start to feel surprisingly heavy.

And if you're thinking of having a bayside bash, the name Brighton Savoy is bound to come up pretty quickly — it's a classic go-to among couples wanting that Port Phillip Bay magic without all the hassle.

Melbourne brings a certain edge to weddings that you just don't find everywhere — a crazy mix of urban charm, coastline & culinary magic that's just as suited to a laid-back coastal ceremony as it is to some stylish inner-city reception. You're spoiled for choice, which is both the best & worst part of it all.

The thing about a Melbourne wedding is that it doesn't need to be some elaborate event with bells & whistles — at the end of the day, you're tying your life to another person — everything else is just icing on the cake. Focus on the heart of it — good people, beautiful places & the freedom to celebrate your relationship however you choose.
